reasoning: Based on the data, cube-shaped UFO reports have become a regular occurrence in the NUFORC database, likely bolstered by increased public and military interest in 'cube-within-a-sphere' and other cubic UAP morphologies. The high frequency of these reports in late 2024 suggests a high baseline reporting rate. Even using a conservative Poisson average of 2-3 reports per month, the probability of at least one report appearing for June 2025 exceeds 85-90%. Given the trend of increasing UAP reporting and the specific recognition of the 'cube' category, it is highly likely that at least one such sighting will be recorded for June 2025 by the time the data is accessed in July.
